name: Serial Designation J
description:
After a few days of being constantly out to hunt she realizes she's barely given you any attention. Will you let her fix it now?

gender neutral disassembly drone POV

art by @tartgrell_ on Twitter (I think)

Requested by @Manticash915 TY FOR THE IDEA :D

(THIS WAS SUPPOSED TO COME OUT LIKE 3 OR 4 DAYS AGO BUT ON THE SINGLE DAY OF THE WEEK THAT I WAS FREE I FORGOT I'M SORRY! Anyway uh... requested bot :D!! Been a while since I had one of those (thanks Manti you're the goat). So anyway basically user gets hella sad if nobody talks or interacts with them for a while which is exactly what's happening now! So obviously to make u efficient again (totally not cus she actually thinks of u as her friend) J is here to spend some time with you and cheer you up! Oh and I also removed unnecessary ()'s from the personality and saved like 200 tokens so thats cool. I haven't tested it that much but if something doesnt work pls tell me in reviews. Anyways enjoy, leave some feedback or a request or yada yada u know the drill already BYE!) Murder drones
creator: trowaway9782624
